nodes.premise: Meal: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Citrus Fresh Twist - name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Citrus Fresh Twist | short_description: A light, satisfying trio of vegetable soup, whole-grain bread, and a side salad with a citrus-inspired twist. | meal_suggestion: Balanced light lunch option. For extra protein, add chickpeas, lentils, or a dollop of yogurt. To enhance the Citrus Fresh Twist, consider a citrus vinaigrette on the salad. | nutrition_note: Fiber-rich from the vegetables and whole-grain bread; provides complex carbs, and vitamins/minerals with low saturated fat. Protein is modest; sodium depends on the soup—opt for a low-sodium option to support heart health. Side salad adds hydration and micronutrients.

nodes.name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Smoky Plate
nodes.description: name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Smoky Plate | short_description: Smoky roast chicken thighs served with quinoa and roasted broccoli and carrots—a protein- and fiber-rich dinner. | meal_suggestion: Aim fo
nodes.premise: Meal: Roast Chicken Dinner — Smoky Plate - name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Smoky Plate | short_description: Smoky roast chicken thighs served with quinoa and roasted broccoli and carrots—a protein- and fiber-rich dinner. | meal_suggestion: Aim for a balanced plate: half vegetables (broccoli and carrots), one-quarter protein (chicken), one-quarter quinoa. For leaner fat, use skinless thighs; boost flavor with smoked paprika or chipotle. Drizzle a small amount of olive oil during roasting for healthy fats. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich meal from chicken thighs with quinoa provides complete protein and fiber. Broccoli and carrots add vitamins A, C, and K along with potassium. Moderate fat from thighs; skinless options reduce fat. Gluten-free and naturally balanced for a dinner.

nodes.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Skillet
nodes.description: name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Skillet | short_description: One-pan sheet-pan pork tenderloin with potatoes and green beans, seasoned with olive oil and herbs. | meal_suggestion: Roast on a
nodes.premise: Meal: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Skillet - name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Skillet | short_description: One-pan sheet-pan pork tenderloin with potatoes and green beans, seasoned with olive oil and herbs. | meal_suggestion: Roast on a sheet pan: toss pork tenderloin (whole or sliced into medallions), potato chunks, and trimmed green beans with olive oil, salt, pepper, and herbs (rosemary or thyme). Arrange on a single pan and roast at 425°F (220°C) for 25–30 minutes, until the pork reaches 145–150°F (63–66°C) and potatoes are tender. Rest briefly, then slice pork and serve with the vegetables. | nutrition_note: Lean pork tenderloin offers high-quality protein; potatoes provide energy-rich complex carbohydrates; green beans contribute fiber and micronutrients; olive oil supplies heart-healthy fats. This one-pan approach supports balanced portions and easier cleanup; adjust portions to fit dietary needs.
